_comment: Curated resource directory shown on the Resources page (native + web). Each category has parallel real_resources (Real mode) and sim_resources (Sim mode) lists. Extend by appending categories — no code change required. URLs starting with '#' are in-app anchors, not external links.

real_resources.title: Khan Academy
real_resources.description: Free courses in math, science, computing, and more.

real_resources.title: MIT OpenCourseWare
real_resources.description: Free lecture notes, exams, and videos from MIT.

real_resources.title: Coursera
real_resources.description: Online courses from top universities worldwide.

sim_resources.title: Farming Guide
sim_resources.description: Learn crop rotation, soil types, and seasonal planting.

sim_resources.title: Crafting Handbook
sim_resources.description: Recipes, materials, and crafting station requirements.

sim_resources.title: Survival Basics
sim_resources.description: Water, shelter, food — the essentials for new players.

real_resources.title: WHO Resources
real_resources.description: World Health Organization health topics and data.

real_resources.title: Medline Plus
real_resources.description: Health information from the National Library of Medicine.

real_resources.title: Crisis Text Line
real_resources.description: Text HOME to 741741 for free crisis counseling.

sim_resources.title: Health System
sim_resources.description: How hunger, thirst, and injury affect your character.

sim_resources.title: Medicine Crafting
sim_resources.description: Recipes for bandages, potions, and medical supplies.

real_resources.title: Legal Aid
real_resources.description: Find free legal help in your area.

real_resources.title: Know Your Rights
real_resources.description: ACLU guide to your constitutional rights.

sim_resources.title: Guild Laws
sim_resources.description: Rules and governance within player guilds.

sim_resources.title: Trade Regulations
sim_resources.description: Fair trading rules and dispute resolution.

real_resources.title: HUD Resources
real_resources.description: US Dept of Housing: rental assistance, fair housing.

real_resources.title: Habitat for Humanity
real_resources.description: Affordable housing and home repair assistance.

sim_resources.title: Building Guide
sim_resources.description: How to construct shelters, bases, and advanced structures.

sim_resources.title: Base Defense
sim_resources.description: Fortification and perimeter security for your base.

real_resources.title: Feeding America
real_resources.description: Find local food banks and meal programs.

sim_resources.title: Farming System
sim_resources.description: Crop growth, irrigation, and harvest mechanics.

sim_resources.title: Cooking Recipes
sim_resources.description: Food recipes with buff effects and nutrition values.

real_resources.title: FreeCodeCamp
real_resources.description: Learn to code for free with interactive lessons.

real_resources.title: Open Source Guides
real_resources.description: How to contribute to and maintain open source projects.

sim_resources.title: Automation
sim_resources.description: Setting up conveyor belts, sorters, and auto-crafters.
